BMM_DEFINITIONS.name: BMM_DEFINITIONS
BMM_DEFINITIONS.documentation: Definitions used by all BMM packages.

Bmm_internal_version.name: Bmm_internal_version
Bmm_internal_version.documentation: Current internal version of BMM meta-model, used to determine if a given schema can be processed by a given implementation of the model.

Schema_name_delimiter.name: Schema_name_delimiter
Schema_name_delimiter.documentation: Delimiter used to separate schema id from package path in a fully qualified path.

Package_name_delimiter.name: Package_name_delimiter
Package_name_delimiter.documentation: Delimiter used to separate package names in a package path.

id.name: id
id.documentation: Full identifier of the included schema, e.g. "openehr_primitive_types_1.0.2".

BMM_MODEL_ELEMENT.name: BMM_MODEL_ELEMENT
BMM_MODEL_ELEMENT.documentation: Ancestor class of most BMM model elements.

BMM_CONTAINER_PROPERTY.name: BMM_CONTAINER_PROPERTY
BMM_CONTAINER_PROPERTY.documentation: Subtype of BMM_PROPERTY that represents a container type based on one of the inbuilt types List <>, Set <>, Array <>.

display_name.name: display_name
display_name.documentation: Name of this attribute to display in UI.

BMM_PROPERTY.name: BMM_PROPERTY
BMM_PROPERTY.documentation: Model of a property definition within a class definition of an object model. Generic parameter takes care of variants.

name.name: name
name.documentation: Name of this property in the model.

is_mandatory.name: is_mandatory
is_mandatory.documentation: True if this property is mandatory in its class.

is_computed.name: is_computed
is_computed.documentation: True if this property is computed rather than stored in objects of this class.

is_im_runtime.name: is_im_runtime
is_im_runtime.documentation: True if this property is marked with info model `_im_runtime_` property.

is_im_infrastructure.name: is_im_infrastructure
is_im_infrastructure.documentation: True if this property was marked with info model `_im_infrastructure_` flag.

existence.name: existence
existence.documentation: Interval form of `0..1`, `1..1` etc, generated from `_is_mandatory_`.

display_name.name: display_name
display_name.documentation: Name of this attribute to display in UI.

BMM_MODEL.name: BMM_MODEL
BMM_MODEL.documentation: Model of a BMM schema (along with what is inherited from BMM_SCHEMA_CORE).

primitive_types.name: primitive_types
primitive_types.documentation: List of keys in `class_definitions' of items marked as primitive types, as defined in input schema.

enumeration_types.name: enumeration_types
enumeration_types.documentation: List of keys in `class_definitions' of items that are enumeration types, as defined in input schema.

class_definition.name: class_definition
class_definition.documentation: Retrieve the class definition corresponding to `a_type_name' (which may contain a generic part).

enumeration_definition.name: enumeration_definition
enumeration_definition.documentation: Retrieve the enumeration definition corresponding to `a_type_name'.

property_definition.name: property_definition
property_definition.documentation: Retrieve the property definition for `a_prop_name' in flattened class corresponding to `a_type_name'.

ms_conformant_property_type.name: ms_conformant_property_type
ms_conformant_property_type.documentation: True if `a_ms_property_type' is a valid 'MS' dynamic type for `a_property' in BMM type `a_bmm_type_name'. 'MS' conformance means 'model-semantic' conformance, which abstracts away container types like List<>, Set<> etc and compares the dynamic type with the relation target type in the UML sense, i.e. regardless of whether there is single or multiple containment.

property_definition_at_path.name: property_definition_at_path
property_definition_at_path.documentation: Retrieve the property definition for `a_property_path' in flattened class corresponding to `a_type_name'.

all_ancestor_classes.name: all_ancestor_classes
all_ancestor_classes.documentation: Return all ancestor types of `a_class_name' up to root class (usually 'ANY', 'Object' or something similar). Does not include current class. Returns empty list if none.

type_conforms_to.name: type_conforms_to
type_conforms_to.documentation: Check conformance of `a_desc_type' to `an_anc_type'; the types may be generic, and may contain open generic parameters like 'T' etc. These are replaced with their appropriate constrainer types, or Any during the conformance testing process.

BMM_PACKAGE.name: BMM_PACKAGE
BMM_PACKAGE.documentation: Abstraction of a package as a tree structure whose nodes can contain other packages and classes.

name.name: name
name.documentation: Name of this package. This name may be qualified if it is a top-level package.

classes.name: classes
classes.documentation: Classes listed as being in this package.

root_classes.name: root_classes
root_classes.documentation: Obtain the set of top-level classes in this package, either from this package itself or by recursing into the structure until classes are obtained from child packages. Recurse into each child only far enough to find the first level of classes.

path.name: path
path.documentation: Full path of this package back to root package.

BMM_PACKAGE_CONTAINER.name: BMM_PACKAGE_CONTAINER
BMM_PACKAGE_CONTAINER.documentation: Abstraction of a BMM model component that contains packages and classes.

packages.name: packages
packages.documentation: Child packages; keys all in upper case for guaranteed matching.

do_recursive_packages.name: do_recursive_packages
do_recursive_packages.documentation: Recursively execute `action', which is a procedure taking a BMM_PACKAGE argument, on all members of packages.

has_package_path.name: has_package_path
has_package_path.documentation: True if there is a package at the path `a_path'; paths are delimited with Package_name_delimiter.

P_BMM_CLASS.name: P_BMM_CLASS
P_BMM_CLASS.documentation: Definition of persistent form of `BMM_CLASS` for serialisation to ODIN, JSON, XML etc.

name.name: name
name.documentation: Name of the class. Persisted attribute.

ancestors.name: ancestors
ancestors.documentation: List of immediate inheritance parents. If there are generic ancestors, use `_ancestor_defs_` instead. Persisted attribute.

constants.name: constants
constants.documentation: Constants defined in this class, keyed by name. Persistent attribute.

properties.name: properties
properties.documentation: List of attributes defined in this class. Persistent attribute.

functions.name: functions
functions.documentation: List of functions (routines) defined in this class, keyed by name. Persistent attribute.

invariants.name: invariants
invariants.documentation: Invariants defined on this class, as a Hash of assertion expressions keyed by tag. Persisted attribute.

is_abstract.name: is_abstract
is_abstract.documentation: True if this is an abstract type. Persisted attribute.

is_override.name: is_override
is_override.documentation: True if this class definition overrides one found in an included schema.

generic_parameter_defs.name: generic_parameter_defs
generic_parameter_defs.documentation: List of generic parameter definitions. Persisted attribute.

source_schema_id.name: source_schema_id
source_schema_id.documentation: Reference to original source schema defining this class. Set during `BMM_SCHEMA` materialise. Useful for GUI tools to enable user to edit the schema file containing a given class (i.e. taking into account that a class may be in any of the schemas in a schema inclusion hierarchy).

uid.name: uid
uid.documentation: Unique id generated for later comparison during merging, in order to detect if two classes are the same. Assigned in post-load processing.

ancestor_defs.name: ancestor_defs
ancestor_defs.documentation: List of structured inheritance ancestors, used only in the case of generic inheritance. Persisted attribute.

is_generic.name: is_generic
is_generic.documentation: True if this class is a generic class.

populate_bmm_class.name: populate_bmm_class
populate_bmm_class.documentation: Add remaining model elements from Current to `_bmm_class_definition_`.

P_BMM_INTERFACE.name: P_BMM_INTERFACE
P_BMM_INTERFACE.documentation: Persistent form of a BMM interface, i.e. a class-like definition consisting only of functions (no state). Used to capture pure operation interfaces.

name.name: name
name.documentation: Name of this interface. Persisted attribute.

functions.name: functions
functions.documentation: Functions (routines) declared by this interface, keyed by name. Persistent attribute.

item_documentations.name: item_documentations
item_documentations.documentation: Optional documentation strings for the enumeration items, in the same order as `_item_names_`. Persisted attribute.

bmm_version.name: bmm_version
bmm_version.documentation: Version of the BMM (P_BMM) meta-model to which this schema conforms, e.g. `2.4`. Persisted attribute.

includes.name: includes
includes.documentation: Other schemas included by this schema, keyed by schema id. Persisted attribute.

canonical_packages.name: canonical_packages
canonical_packages.documentation: Package structure in which all top-level qualified package names like `xx.yy.zz` have been expanded out to a hierarchy of `BMM_PACKAGE` objects.

name.name: name
name.documentation: Name of this property within its class. Persisted attribute.

is_mandatory.name: is_mandatory
is_mandatory.documentation: True if this property is mandatory in its class. Persisted attribute.

is_computed.name: is_computed
is_computed.documentation: True if this property is computed rather than stored in objects of this class. Persisted Attribute.

is_im_infrastructure.name: is_im_infrastructure
is_im_infrastructure.documentation: True if this property is info model 'infrastructure' rather than 'data'. Persisted attribute.

is_im_runtime.name: is_im_runtime
is_im_runtime.documentation: True if this property is info model 'runtime' settable property. Persisted attribute.

type_def.name: type_def
type_def.documentation: Type definition of this property, if not a simple String type reference. Persisted attribute.

name.name: name
name.documentation: Name of the parameter, e.g. 'T' etc. Persisted attribute. Name is limited to 1 character, upper case.

conforms_to_type.name: conforms_to_type
conforms_to_type.documentation: Optional conformance constraint - the name of a type to which a concrete substitution of this generic parameter must conform. Persisted attribute.

create_bmm_type.name: create_bmm_type
create_bmm_type.documentation: Create appropriate `BMM_XXX` object; effected in descendants.

as_type_string.name: as_type_string
as_type_string.documentation: Formal name of the type for display.

container_type.name: container_type
container_type.documentation: The type of the container. This converts to the `_root_type_` in `BMM_GENERIC_TYPE`. Persisted attribute.

type_def.name: type_def
type_def.documentation: Type definition of `_type_`, if not a simple String type reference. Persisted attribute.

type.name: type
type.documentation: The target type; this converts to the first parameter in `_generic_parameters_` in `BMM_GENERIC_TYPE`. Persisted attribute.

type_ref.name: type_ref
type_ref.documentation: The target type; this converts to the first parameter in `_generic_parameters_` in `BMM_GENERIC_TYPE`. Persisted attribute.

type.name: type
type.documentation: Name of type - must be a simple class name.

P_BMM_OPEN_TYPE.name: P_BMM_OPEN_TYPE
P_BMM_OPEN_TYPE.documentation: Persistent form of `BMM_GENERIC_PARAMETER` or `BMM_PARAMETER_TYPE` (in BMM v3).

type.name: type
type.documentation: Simple type parameter as a single letter like 'T', 'G' etc.

root_type.name: root_type
root_type.documentation: Root type of this generic type, e.g. `Interval` in `Interval<Integer>`.

generic_parameter_defs.name: generic_parameter_defs
generic_parameter_defs.documentation: Generic parameters of the root_type in this type specifier if non-simple types. The order must match the order of the owning class's formal generic parameter declarations. Persistent attribute.

generic_parameters.name: generic_parameters
generic_parameters.documentation: Generic parameters of the `_root_type_` in this type specifier, if simple types. The order must match the order of the owning class's formal generic parameter declarations. Persistent attribute.

generic_parameter_refs.name: generic_parameter_refs
generic_parameter_refs.documentation: Generic parameters of the root_type in this type specifier. The order must match the order of the owning class's formal generic parameter declarations

P_BMM_PACKAGE.name: P_BMM_PACKAGE
P_BMM_PACKAGE.documentation: Persisted form of a package as a tree structure whose nodes can contain more packages and/or classes.

name.name: name
name.documentation: Name of the package from schema; this name may be qualified if it is a top-level package within the schema, or unqualified. Persistent attribute.

classes.name: classes
classes.documentation: List of classes in this package. Persistent attribute.

merge.name: merge
merge.documentation: Merge packages and classes from other (from an included `P_BMM_SCHEMA`) into this package.

create_bmm_package_definition.name: create_bmm_package_definition
create_bmm_package_definition.documentation: Generate a `BMM_PACKAGE_DEFINITION` object and write it to `_bmm_package_definition_`.

P_BMM_PACKAGE_CONTAINER.name: P_BMM_PACKAGE_CONTAINER
P_BMM_PACKAGE_CONTAINER.documentation: Persisted form of a model component that contains packages.

packages.name: packages
packages.documentation: Package structure as a hierarchy of packages each potentially containing names of classes in that package in the original model.

cardinality.name: cardinality
cardinality.documentation: Cardinality of this property in its class. Persistent attribute.

type_def.name: type_def
type_def.documentation: Type definition of this property, if not a simple String type reference. Persistent attribute.

type.name: type
type.documentation: If the type is a simple type, then this attribute will hold the type name. If the type is a container or generic, then type_ref will hold the type definition. The resulting type is generated in type_def.

type_ref.name: type_ref
type_ref.documentation: Type definition of this property computed from `_type_` for later use in `_bmm_property_`.

type_ref.name: type_ref
type_ref.documentation: Type definition of this property computed from `_type_` for later use in `_bmm_property_`.

type.name: type
type.documentation: Type definition of this property, if a simple String type reference. Really we should use `_type_def_` to be regular in the schema, but that makes the schema more wordy and less clear. So we use this persisted String value, and compute the `_type_def_` on the fly. Persisted attribute.

type_def.name: type_def
type_def.documentation: Type definition of this property, if not a simple String type reference. Persistent attribute.

P_BMM_CONSTANT.name: P_BMM_CONSTANT
P_BMM_CONSTANT.documentation: Persistent form of a BMM constant, i.e. a named, typed literal value defined on a class.

name.name: name
name.documentation: Name of this constant within its class. Persisted attribute.

type.name: type
type.documentation: Type name of this constant, as a simple class name. Persisted attribute.

value.name: value
value.documentation: The literal value of this constant, in its persisted (serialised) form. Persisted attribute.

P_BMM_FUNCTION.name: P_BMM_FUNCTION
P_BMM_FUNCTION.documentation: Persistent form of a BMM function (routine) definition within a class definition.

name.name: name
name.documentation: Name of this function within its class. Persisted attribute.

aliases.name: aliases
aliases.documentation: Optional alias names for this function, keyed by alias. Persisted attribute.

is_abstract.name: is_abstract
is_abstract.documentation: True if this function is abstract in its class, i.e. has no implementation. Persisted attribute.

parameters.name: parameters
parameters.documentation: Formal parameters of the function, keyed by parameter name. Persisted attribute.

pre_conditions.name: pre_conditions
pre_conditions.documentation: Optional pre-condition assertions on this function, keyed by tag. Persisted attribute.

post_conditions.name: post_conditions
post_conditions.documentation: Optional post-condition assertions on this function, keyed by tag. Persisted attribute.

result.name: result
result.documentation: Type definition of the function result, if any (absent for procedures). Persisted attribute.

is_nullable.name: is_nullable
is_nullable.documentation: True if the result of this function is allowed to be Void (null). Persisted attribute.

P_BMM_FUNCTION_PARAMETER.name: P_BMM_FUNCTION_PARAMETER
P_BMM_FUNCTION_PARAMETER.documentation: Persistent form of a BMM function (routine) parameter; abstract parent of the concrete persisted parameter kinds.

name.name: name
name.documentation: Name of this parameter within its function signature. Persisted attribute.

is_nullable.name: is_nullable
is_nullable.documentation: True if this parameter is allowed to be Void (null) in a call. Persisted attribute.

P_BMM_SINGLE_FUNCTION_PARAMETER.name: P_BMM_SINGLE_FUNCTION_PARAMETER
P_BMM_SINGLE_FUNCTION_PARAMETER.documentation: Persistent form of a single-valued function parameter, i.e. one whose type is a simple class reference.

type.name: type
type.documentation: Type name of this parameter, as a simple class name. Persisted attribute.

P_BMM_SINGLE_FUNCTION_PARAMETER_OPEN.name: P_BMM_SINGLE_FUNCTION_PARAMETER_OPEN
P_BMM_SINGLE_FUNCTION_PARAMETER_OPEN.documentation: Persistent form of a single-valued function parameter whose type is an open generic parameter, e.g. `T`.

type.name: type
type.documentation: Open type parameter, i.e. a generic parameter name such as `T`, `G` etc. Persisted attribute.

P_BMM_CONTAINER_FUNCTION_PARAMETER.name: P_BMM_CONTAINER_FUNCTION_PARAMETER
P_BMM_CONTAINER_FUNCTION_PARAMETER.documentation: Persistent form of a function parameter whose type is a container type such as `List<T>`.

type_def.name: type_def
type_def.documentation: Type definition of this parameter. Persisted attribute.

cardinality.name: cardinality
cardinality.documentation: Cardinality of this parameter, if a container type. Persisted attribute.

P_BMM_GENERIC_FUNCTION_PARAMETER.name: P_BMM_GENERIC_FUNCTION_PARAMETER
P_BMM_GENERIC_FUNCTION_PARAMETER.documentation: Persistent form of a function parameter whose type is a generic type such as `Interval<Time>`.

type_def.name: type_def
type_def.documentation: Type definition of this parameter. Persisted attribute.

P_BMM_ENUMERATION_INTEGER.name: P_BMM_ENUMERATION_INTEGER
P_BMM_ENUMERATION_INTEGER.documentation: Persistent form of an instance of `BMM_ENUMERATION_INTEGER`.

P_BMM_BASE_TYPE.name: P_BMM_BASE_TYPE
P_BMM_BASE_TYPE.documentation: Persistent form of a proper (non-container) BMM type.

P_BMM_SCHEMA_DESCRIPTOR.name: P_BMM_SCHEMA_DESCRIPTOR
P_BMM_SCHEMA_DESCRIPTOR.documentation: Concrete descendant of `BMM_SCHEMA_DESCRIPTOR` that provides a way to read an ODIN or other similarly encoded P_BMM schema file.

type_def.name: type_def
type_def.documentation: Type definition of this property, if not a simple String type reference. Persistent attribute.

ASSERTION.name: ASSERTION
ASSERTION.documentation: Meta-type for a first order predicate logic expression with a Boolean result.

tag.name: tag
tag.documentation: Expression tag, used for differentiating multiple assertions.

string_expression.name: string_expression
string_expression.documentation: String form of expression, in case an expression evaluator taking String expressions is used for evaluation.

ASSIGNMENT.name: ASSIGNMENT
ASSIGNMENT.documentation: Meta-type representing the assignment statement, which associates a named variable with an expression, and produces no value.

target.name: target
target.documentation: The target variable on the notional left-hand side of this assignment.

source.name: source
source.documentation: Source right hand side) of the assignment.

EXPR_FUNCTION_CALL.name: EXPR_FUNCTION_CALL
EXPR_FUNCTION_CALL.documentation: Node representing a function call with 0 or more arguments.

arguments.name: arguments
arguments.documentation: Arguments of this function, which can be from 0 to any number. Functions with no arguments are typically used to represent real world varying values like 'current time' and so on.

EXPRESSION.name: EXPRESSION
EXPRESSION.documentation: Abstract parent of all expression meta-types.

type.name: type
type.documentation: The primitive type of this node, which must be determined by redefinitions in concrete classes.

EXPR_LEAF.name: EXPR_LEAF

item.name: item
item.documentation: The reference item from which the value of this node can be computed.

EXPR_LITERAL.name: EXPR_LITERAL
EXPR_LITERAL.documentation: Literal value expression tree leaf item. This can represent a literal value of any primitive type included in the `PRIMITIVE_TYPE` enumeration.

item.name: item
item.documentation: A statically set constant value of a primitive type.

precedence_overridden.name: precedence_overridden
precedence_overridden.documentation: True if the natural precedence of operators is overridden in the expression represented by this node of the expression tree. If True, parentheses should be introduced around the totality of the syntax expression corresponding to this operator node and its operands.

symbol.name: symbol
symbol.documentation: The symbol actually used in the rule, or intended to be used for serialisation. Must be a member of `operator_def.symbols`.

EXPR_VARIABLE_REF.name: EXPR_VARIABLE_REF
EXPR_VARIABLE_REF.documentation: Expression tree leaf item representing a reference to a declared variable.

EXTERNAL_QUERY.name: EXTERNAL_QUERY
EXTERNAL_QUERY.documentation: Definition of a variable whose value is derived from a query run on a data context in the operational environment. Typical uses of this kind of variable are to obtain values like the patient date of birth, sex, weight, and so on. It could also be used to obtain items from a knowledge context, such as a drug database.

context.name: context
context.documentation:
Optional name of context. This allows a basic separation of query types to be done in more sophisticated environments. Possible values might be “patient”, “medications” and so on.
Not yet standardised.

query_id.name: query_id
query_id.documentation:
Identifier of query in the external context, e.g. “date_of_birth”.
Not yet standardised.

query_args.name: query_args
query_args.documentation:
Optional arguments to query.
Not yet standardised.

EXPR_VALUE.name: EXPR_VALUE
EXPR_VALUE.documentation: Any kind of statement element that can be evaluated. The type will either be supplied in descendant types or else will be inferred by an assignment statement linked to a typed variable.

value.name: value
value.documentation: The computed value of this node as a result of the nodes below it, for operator nodes, or else statically set or otherwise derived values.

STATEMENT_SET.name: STATEMENT_SET
STATEMENT_SET.documentation: A container for a specific set of statements intended to be used together.

statement.name: statement
statement.documentation: The member statements of this statement set.

name.name: name
name.documentation: Optional name of this rule set.

execution_result.name: execution_result
execution_result.documentation: Execution result of the whole rule set. Determined by the and-ing of result values of Assertions in the rule set.

STATEMENT.name: STATEMENT
STATEMENT.documentation: Meta-type for the notion of statement, which is a non-value-returning entity.

VARIABLE_DECLARATION.name: VARIABLE_DECLARATION
VARIABLE_DECLARATION.documentation: Meta-type for the declaration of a named variable that can be used in an expression.

type.name: type
type.documentation: Primitive type of the variable, enabling its use to be type-checked in expressions.

EXPR_VALUE_REF.name: EXPR_VALUE_REF
EXPR_VALUE_REF.documentation: Path-based reference to a value in a data structure.

EXPR_FOR_ALL.name: EXPR_FOR_ALL
EXPR_FOR_ALL.documentation: Universal quantification operator, usually known as `for_all`, whose operand is a collection of items referenced by an `EXPR_VALUE_REF`. The `_condition_` attribute represents an assertion that is applied to every member of the collection at runtime to determine the result.

condition.name: condition
condition.documentation: Boolean condition that returns True or False when applied to a member of the operand of a `for_all` operator.

operand.name: operand
operand.documentation: Reference to collection / container object to which the `for_all` operator is to be applied.

OPERATOR_KIND.name: OPERATOR_KIND
item_documentations: Arithemetic exponent (to the power of) operator.

EXPR_TYPE_DEF.name: EXPR_TYPE_DEF
EXPR_TYPE_DEF.documentation: Ancestor class for type definitions known in the openEHR Expression formalism.

type_name.name: type_name
type_name.documentation: Natural language type name of this type as used in abstract rules syntax variable declarations.

type_anchor.name: type_anchor
type_anchor.documentation: Attribute of the openEHR primitive type (or Any) corresponding to this type definition meta-type.

TYPE_DEF_BOOLEAN.name: TYPE_DEF_BOOLEAN
TYPE_DEF_BOOLEAN.documentation: Rules meta-type representing the primitive type Boolean.

TYPE_DEF_DATE.name: TYPE_DEF_DATE
TYPE_DEF_DATE.documentation: Rules meta-type representing the primitive type Date.

TYPE_DEF_DATE_TIME.name: TYPE_DEF_DATE_TIME
TYPE_DEF_DATE_TIME.documentation: Rules meta-type representing the primitive type Date_time.

TYPE_DEF_DURATION.name: TYPE_DEF_DURATION
TYPE_DEF_DURATION.documentation: Rules meta-type representing the primitive type Duration.

TYPE_DEF_INTEGER.name: TYPE_DEF_INTEGER
TYPE_DEF_INTEGER.documentation: Rules meta-type representing the primitive type Integer.

TYPE_DEF_OBJECT_REF.name: TYPE_DEF_OBJECT_REF
TYPE_DEF_OBJECT_REF.documentation: Rules meta-type representing the type Object_ref, which is assumed to by the type of any non-primitive reference target within a rule.

TYPE_DEF_REAL.name: TYPE_DEF_REAL
TYPE_DEF_REAL.documentation: Rules meta-type representing the primitive type Real.

TYPE_DEF_STRING.name: TYPE_DEF_STRING
TYPE_DEF_STRING.documentation: Rules meta-type representing the primitive type String.

TYPE_DEF_TERMINOLOGY_CODE.name: TYPE_DEF_TERMINOLOGY_CODE
TYPE_DEF_TERMINOLOGY_CODE.documentation: Rules meta-type representing the primitive type Terminology_code.

TYPE_DEF_TIME.name: TYPE_DEF_TIME
TYPE_DEF_TIME.documentation: Rules meta-type representing the primitive type Time.

TYPE_DEF_URI.name: TYPE_DEF_URI
TYPE_DEF_URI.documentation: Rules meta-type representing the primitive type Uri.

BMM_CLASSIFIER.name: BMM_CLASSIFIER
BMM_CLASSIFIER.documentation: Abstract idea of specifying a type either by definition or by reference.

type_name.name: type_name
type_name.documentation: Formal string form of the type as per UML.

type_category.name: type_category
type_category.documentation: Generate a type category of main target type from Type_category_xx values.

type_signature.name: type_signature
type_signature.documentation: Signature form of the type, which for generics includes generic parameter constrainer types e.g. Interval<T:Ordered>.

base_class.name: base_class
base_class.documentation: Main design class for this type, from which properties etc can be extracted.

flattened_type_list.name: flattened_type_list
flattened_type_list.documentation: Completely flattened list of type names, flattening out all generic parameters.

BMM_CLASS.name: BMM_CLASS
BMM_CLASS.documentation: Definition of a class in an object model. A class is type that may be open or closed in terms of other types mentioned within.

name.name: name
name.documentation: Name of this class. Note that unlike UML, names of classes are just the root name, even if the class is generic.

properties.name: properties
properties.documentation: List of attributes defined in this class.

source_schema_id.name: source_schema_id
source_schema_id.documentation: Reference to original source schema defining this class. Useful for UI tools to determine which original schema file to open for a given class for manual editing.

is_abstract.name: is_abstract
is_abstract.documentation: True if this class is abstract in its model.

is_primitive_type.name: is_primitive_type
is_primitive_type.documentation: True if this class is designated a primitive type within the overall type system of the schema.

is_override.name: is_override
is_override.documentation: True if this definition overrides a class of the same name in an included schema.

all_ancestors.name: all_ancestors
all_ancestors.documentation: List of all inheritance parent class names, recursively.

all_descendants.name: all_descendants
all_descendants.documentation: Compute all descendants by following immediate_descendants.

suppliers.name: suppliers
suppliers.documentation: List of names of immediate supplier classes, including concrete generic parameters, concrete descendants of abstract statically defined types, and inherited suppliers. This list includes primitive types.

suppliers_non_primitive.name: suppliers_non_primitive
suppliers_non_primitive.documentation: Same as `suppliers' minus primitive types, as defined in input schema.

supplier_closure.name: supplier_closure
supplier_closure.documentation: List of names of all classes in full supplier closure, including concrete generic parameters. This list includes primitive types.

base_class.name: base_class
base_class.documentation: Main design class for this type, from which properties etc can be extracted.

package_path.name: package_path
package_path.documentation: Fully qualified package name, of form: 'package.package'.

class_path.name: class_path
class_path.documentation: Fully qualified class name, of form: 'package.package.CLASS' with package path in lower-case and class in original case.

flat_properties.name: flat_properties
flat_properties.documentation: List of all properties due to current and ancestor classes, keyed by property name.

type_name.name: type_name
type_name.documentation: Formal string form of the type as per UML.

BMM_GENERIC_CLASS.name: BMM_GENERIC_CLASS
BMM_GENERIC_CLASS.documentation: Definition of a generic class in an object model.

generic_parameters.name: generic_parameters
generic_parameters.documentation: List of generic parameter definitions, keyed by name of generic parameter; these are defined either directly on this class or by the addition of an ancestor class which is generic.

type_signature.name: type_signature
type_signature.documentation: Signature form of the type, which for generics includes generic parameter constrainer types e.g. Interval<T:Ordered>.

type_name.name: type_name
type_name.documentation: Formal string form of the type as per UML.

BMM_ENUMERATION.name: BMM_ENUMERATION
BMM_ENUMERATION.documentation: Definition of an enumeration type. In the BMM system, an 'enumeration' type is understood as an underlying basic type and a set of named constants of that type. It is designed so that the default type is Integer, and the default constants are numbered 0, 1, ... Optional model elements can be specified to override the values and / or the type.

item_names.name: item_names
item_names.documentation: The list of names of the enumeration. If no values are supplied, the integer values 0, 1, 2, ... are assumed.

item_values.name: item_values
item_values.documentation: Optional list of specific values. Must be 1:1 with `item_names' list.

underlying_type_name.name: underlying_type_name
underlying_type_name.documentation: Name of type any concrete BMM_ENUMERATION_* sub-type is based on, i.e. the name of type bound to 'T' in a declared use of this type.

underlying_type_name.name: underlying_type_name
underlying_type_name.documentation: Name of type any concrete BMM_ENUMERATION_* sub-type is based on. Redefined to "INTEGER".

underlying_type_name.name: underlying_type_name
underlying_type_name.documentation: Name of type any concrete BMM_ENUMERATION_* sub-type is based on. Redefined to "STRING".

BMM_TYPE.name: BMM_TYPE
BMM_TYPE.documentation: Abstract idea of specifying a type in some context. This is not the same as 'defining' a class. A type specification is essentially a reference of some kind, that defines the type of an attribute, or function result or argument. It may include generic parameters that might or might not be bound. See subtypes.

has_type_substitutions.name: has_type_substitutions
has_type_substitutions.documentation: Determine if there are any type substitutions.

type_substitutions.name: type_substitutions
type_substitutions.documentation: List of type substitutions if any available for this type within the current BMM model.

BMM_SIMPLE_TYPE.name: BMM_SIMPLE_TYPE
BMM_SIMPLE_TYPE.documentation: Type reference to a single type i.e. not generic or container type.

base_class.name: base_class
base_class.documentation: The target type; this converts to the first parameter in generic_parameters in BMM_GENERIC_TYPE.

BMM_OPEN_TYPE.name: BMM_OPEN_TYPE
BMM_OPEN_TYPE.documentation: Open type reference to a single type parameter, i.e. typically 'T', 'V', 'K' etc. The parameter must be in the type declaration of the owning BMM_CLASS.

generic_constraint.name: generic_constraint
generic_constraint.documentation: The generic constraint, which will be 'Any' if nothing set in original model.

BMM_CONTAINER_TYPE.name: BMM_CONTAINER_TYPE
BMM_CONTAINER_TYPE.documentation: Type reference that specifies containers with one generic parameter.

container_type.name: container_type
container_type.documentation: The type of the container. This converts to the root_type in BMM_GENERIC_TYPE.

base_type.name: base_type
base_type.documentation: The target type; this converts to the first parameter in generic_parameters in BMM_GENERIC_TYPE.

BMM_INDEXED_CONTAINER_TYPE.name: BMM_INDEXED_CONTAINER_TYPE
BMM_INDEXED_CONTAINER_TYPE.documentation: Type reference that specifies an indexed container such as `Hash<K,V>`, i.e. a container whose members are accessed via a key (index) type.

index_type.name: index_type
index_type.documentation: The key (index) type of the container, e.g. `String` in `Hash<String,EVENT_ACTION>`.

BMM_GENERIC_TYPE.name: BMM_GENERIC_TYPE
BMM_GENERIC_TYPE.documentation: Type reference based on a generic class, e.g. 'HashTable <List <Packet>, String>'.

generic_parameters.name: generic_parameters
generic_parameters.documentation: Generic parameters of the root_type in this type specifier. The order must match the order of the owning class's formal generic parameter declarations.

base_class.name: base_class
base_class.documentation: The base class of this type.

type_name.name: type_name
type_name.documentation: Return the full name of the type including generic parameters, e.g. 'DV_INTERVAL<T>', 'TABLE<List<THING>,String>'.

BMM_GENERIC_PARAMETER.name: BMM_GENERIC_PARAMETER
BMM_GENERIC_PARAMETER.documentation: Definition of a generic parameter in a class definition of a generic type.

name.name: name
name.documentation: Name of the parameter, e.g. 'T' etc. The name is limited to 1 character and upper-case.

conforms_to_type.name: conforms_to_type
conforms_to_type.documentation: Optional conformance constraint that must be another valid class name.

inheritance_precursor.name: inheritance_precursor
inheritance_precursor.documentation: If set, is the corresponding generic parameter definition in an ancestor class.

flattened_conforms_to_type.name: flattened_conforms_to_type
flattened_conforms_to_type.documentation: Get any ultimate type conformance constraint on this generic parameter due to inheritance.

effective_conforms_to_type.name: effective_conforms_to_type
effective_conforms_to_type.documentation: Generate ultimate conformance type, which is either from `conforms_to_type' or if not set, 'Any'.

type_signature.name: type_signature
type_signature.documentation: Signature form of the open type, including constrainer type if there is one, e.g. 'T:Ordered'.

rm_publisher.name: rm_publisher
rm_publisher.documentation: Publisher of model expressed in the schema. Persisted attribute.

rm_release.name: rm_release
rm_release.documentation: Release of model expressed in the schema as a 3-part numeric, e.g. "3.1.0". Persisted attribute.

schema_name.name: schema_name
schema_name.documentation: Name of model expressed in schema; a 'schema' usually contains all of the packages of one 'model' of a publisher. A publisher with more than one model can have multiple schemas. Persisted attribute.

schema_author.name: schema_author
schema_author.documentation: Primary author of schema. Persisted attribute.

schema_contributors.name: schema_contributors
schema_contributors.documentation: Contributing authors of schema. Persisted attribute.

archetype_parent_class.name: archetype_parent_class
archetype_parent_class.documentation: Name of a parent class used within the schema to provide archetype capability, enabling filtering of classes in RM visualisation. If empty, 'Any' is assumed. Persisted attribute.

archetype_data_value_parent_class.name: archetype_data_value_parent_class
archetype_data_value_parent_class.documentation: Name of a parent class of logical 'data types' used within the schema to provide archetype capability, enabling filtering of classes in RM visualisation. If empty, 'Any' is assumed. Persisted attribute.

archetype_rm_closure_packages.name: archetype_rm_closure_packages
archetype_rm_closure_packages.documentation: List of top-level package paths that provide the RM 'model' part in archetype identifiers, e.g. the path "org.openehr.ehr" gives "EHR" in "openEHR-EHR". Within this namespace, archetypes can be based on any class reachable from classes defined directly in these packages. Persisted attribute.

archetype_visualise_descendants_of.name: archetype_visualise_descendants_of
archetype_visualise_descendants_of.documentation: If archetype_parent_class is not set, designate a class whose descendants should be made visible in tree and grid renderings of the archetype definition. Persisted attribute.

schema_id.name: schema_id
schema_id.documentation: Derived name of schema, based on model publisher, model name, model release.

REFERENCE_MODEL_ACCESS.name: REFERENCE_MODEL_ACCESS
REFERENCE_MODEL_ACCESS.documentation: Access to service interface to BMM object model.

schema_directories.name: schema_directories
schema_directories.documentation: List of directories where all the schemas loaded here are found.

all_schemas.name: all_schemas
all_schemas.documentation: All schemas found and loaded from `schema_directories`. Keyed by schema_id, i.e. model_publisher '_' schema_name '_' model_release, e.g. openehr_rm_1.0.3.

valid_models.name: valid_models
valid_models.documentation: Top-level (root) models in use. Keyed by logical schema_name, i.e. model_publisher '_' model_name, e.g. "openehr_rm".

initialise_with_load_list.name: initialise_with_load_list
initialise_with_load_list.documentation: Initialise with a specific schema load list, usually a sub-set of schemas that will be found in the directories `a_schema_dirs`.

initialise_all.name: initialise_all
initialise_all.documentation: Initialise with all schemas found in the schema directories.

SCHEMA_DESCRIPTOR.name: SCHEMA_DESCRIPTOR
SCHEMA_DESCRIPTOR.documentation: Descriptor for a BMM schema. Contains a meta-data table of attributes obtained from a mini-ODIN parse of the schema file.

schema_id.name: schema_id
schema_id.documentation: Schema id, formed from meta_data model_publisher '_' schema_name '_' model_release, e.g. openehr_rm_1.0.3.

meta_data.name: meta_data
meta_data.documentation: Table of {key, value} pairs of schema meta-data (bmm_version, model_publisher, schema_name, model_release, schema_revision, schema_lifecycle_state, schema_description, schema_path).

includes.name: includes
includes.documentation: Schema_ids of schemas included by this schema.

is_top_level.name: is_top_level
is_top_level.documentation: True if this is a top-level schema, i.e. not included by some other schema.

is_bmm_compatible.name: is_bmm_compatible
is_bmm_compatible.documentation: True if the BMM version found in the schema (or assumed, if none) is compatible with that in this software.

validate_includes.name: validate_includes
validate_includes.documentation: Validate includes list for this schema, to see if each mentioned schema exists in read schemas.
